query: SELECT id, ipAddress, pathname, timestamp FROM accessLogs WHERE pathname LIKE '%mvp%' AND timestamp BETWEEN '2026-03-03 03:30:00' AND '2026-03-03 04:10:00';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RGrk2thZYC4WY66.root --database Unzs4ztvsFWb6bAqqUL6Mc --execute SELECT id, ipAddress, pathname, timestamp FROM accessLogs WHERE pathname LIKE '%mvp%' AND timestamp BETWEEN '2026-03-03 03:30:00' AND '2026-03-03 04:10:00';
